creator: r..cladan@gmail.com
text:
Update port x11-drivers/xf86-video-radeonhd to version 0.0.3

See http://gitweb.freedesktop.org/?p=xorg/driver/xf86-video-radeonhd for a change list, which includes:
- RandR 1.2 support
- a manual page
- lots of bug fixes
- more supported cards
- (better) LVTMA support

This version is also known as git commit 5a9dd7fd

Tested with 'portlint -A' and 'port test'

Please cc x11@freebsd.org

Fix: Patch attached with submission follows:
